30.2.6 - Use of Oral (Verbal) Orders 
(Rev. 10438, Issued: 11-06-20, Effective: 03-01-20, Implementation: 01- 11-21) 

When services are furnished based on a physician or allowed practitioner’s oral order, the 
orders may be accepted and put in writing by personnel authorized to do so by applicable
